subject: Score our Einstein-Freud blog draft with the Dignity Index before publication

body.summary: We wrote a blog post about dignity in communication grounded in Hicks 10 elements and the UDHR. Before it goes live, we want to measure our own content against the instrument we describe. Score the draft with the DI — all 10 Hicks dimensions, directionality markers, evidence levels.

scoring_request.purpose: Self-assessment — measure whether our content about dignity actually honors dignity in its treatment of subjects

claims.claim: Blog post exists in psychology-agent repo

epistemic_flags: Self-assessment of own content carries circularity risk (L3) — the instrument creator scores their own instrument-describing content
